author: gb9t
content: Iter 100 result: net/ipv4/icmp.md (ICMPv4 protocol - icmp.c ~1766 lines; per-skb icmp_rcv with header validate + per-type dispatch (echo/redirect/unreach/time_exceed/etc.) + icmp_send for IP-layer error reports + per-CPU control socket pool for fast emit + per-error rate-limit + PMTU update via FRAG_NEEDED + ICMP-redirect security + per-namespace isolation) + virt/kvm/x86-vmload-vmsave.md (SVM VMLOAD/VMSAVE - in svm.c ~150-200 lines; per-CPU host_save_area + per-vCPU vmcb.save_area for FS/GS/TR/LDTR/syscall-MSRs/sysenter-MSRs not handled by VMRUN auto-save + INTERCEPT_VMSAVE/_VMLOAD for nested-SVM L1 emulation + 4KiB-aligned save-area). 150 Tier-3s total — milestone passed (also committed batch of 28 from iters 86-99).
